metadata.dataset: JST Macrohistory Database R6 - Global Composite Export

gdpWeighted.description: Annual cross-country GDP-weighted composite using rgdpmad weights among countries with available data for each field and year.
gdpWeighted.inflation: Computed as country-level year-on-year CPI change from cpi, then GDP-weighted across available countries.

equalWeighted.description: Annual equal-weight composite across countries with available data for each field and year.
equalWeighted.inflation: Computed as country-level year-on-year CPI change from cpi, then simple-averaged across available countries.
